info.title: BSP Agent Service
info.description: HTTP API for the io.bsp.agents service — command ingestion, command discovery, event log, and queries.

servers.description: BSP-compliant endpoint base URL (from the http.endpoint field in the /.well-known/bsp manifest). All API paths below are appended to this base URL. For example, if http.endpoint is https://app.example.com/BSP/, then GET /commands resolves to https://app.example.com/BSP/commands.

get.description: Returns the BSP discovery manifest describing available services, capabilities, and transport bindings.

post.summary: Register a webhook subscription for push event delivery
post.description: Registers a webhook callback URL to receive events as they are published. An optional serviceId associates the subscription with a service descriptor for grouping and cleanup.

get.description: Returns the catalogue of command types this service accepts, each with its dataschema URI. This is the discovery surface: callers (Process Managers, AI agents, UIs) call this to learn what commands they can POST and what schema each command's data must conform to.

post.summary: Send a command to the service
post.description: Single CloudEvent ingestion entry point. The runtime validates the data property against the JSON Schema at the dataschema URI (hosted by this API), then queues the command for processing. Returns 201 on success.

201.description: Command accepted and queued for processing

400.description: Invalid command — schema validation failed or missing required CloudEvent attributes

get.description: Returns the queryable log of domain events published by this service. Supports filtering by event type, correlation ID, source, and time range, plus cursor-based pagination. All parameters are optional and combinable.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by CloudEvent type (PascalCase, e.g. ChatKitMessageRememberedV1). Returns all events of this type across all interactions.

parameters.name: correlationId
parameters.description: Filter by correlation identifier — the command id returned by POST /commands. Returns only events produced in response to that specific command submission.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by event source — the string identifying the service that published the event (matches the CloudEvent source field).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Return only events published at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g. 2025-07-01T00:00:00Z).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Return only events published at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return. Server may apply a lower ceiling. Defaults to a server-defined value.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Pagination cursor. Pass the nextCursor value from a previous response to retrieve the next page. Opaque — do not construct manually.

200.description: List of published domain events, with optional pagination cursor

get.description: Opens a persistent Server-Sent Events connection. The server pushes events as they are produced — no polling required. Delivers only events produced after the connection is opened; use GET /events for history. Each event is delivered as an SSE data field containing the CloudEvent JSON payload, with the CloudEvent id echoed as the SSE event id for reconnection via Last-Event-ID.

parameters.name: correlationId
parameters.description: Receive only events produced by a specific command submission — pass the id returned by POST /commands.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by CloudEvent type (PascalCase). Receive only events of this type across all interactions.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by publishing service — matches the CloudEvent source field.

200.description: Persistent SSE stream. Each event is an SSE data field containing a CloudEvent JSON payload.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Event schema name in kebab-case, matching the 'schema' field of the catalogue entry (e.g. counter-proposed)

get.description: Returns the JSON Schema document for a specific event type and version. Mirrors GET /commands/{schema}/{version}. The full URL of this endpoint is the canonical value for the dataschema URI in an event catalogue entry.

Returns the catalogue of query types this service supports, each with its dataschema URI. Same discovery pattern as GET /commands: callers use this to learn what queries they can execute and how to construct the parameters.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Query schema name in kebab-case, matching the 'schema' field of the catalogue entry (e.g. list-brokers)

get.description: Returns the JSON Schema document for a specific query type and version, describing the accepted query string parameters and the response body shape.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Query schema name in kebab-case, matching the 'schema' field of the catalogue entry (e.g. list-brokers)

get.description: Executes the query synchronously and returns current domain state. Parameters (if any) are passed as query string key-value pairs matching the 'parameters' schema in the query schema document. The response body matches the 'response' schema in that document.

200.description: Query result — shape defined by the 'response' schema in the query schema document

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Schema name in kebab-case, matching the 'schema' field of the catalogue entry (e.g. propose-counter, submit-order)

get.description: Returns the JSON Schema document for a specific command type and version. The full URL of this endpoint is the canonical value for the dataschema URI in a command catalogue entry.

tags.name: Commands
tags.description: io.bsp.agents.commands — Discover command types (GET /commands), fetch versioned schemas (GET /commands/{schema}/{version}), and send commands (POST /commands)

tags.name: Events
tags.description: io.bsp.agents.events — Query published domain events (GET /events), subscribe to live events (GET /events/stream), fetch versioned event schemas (GET /events/{schema}/{version}), and manage webhook subscriptions

tags.name: Queries
tags.description: io.bsp.agents.queries — Discover query types (GET /queries), fetch versioned query schemas (GET /queries/{schema}/{version}), and execute queries (GET /queries/{schema})

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Include the token in the Authorization header: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Required when the discovery manifest's authentication.type is 'bearer'. Omit if authentication.type is 'none'.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: API key passed as a request header. Used when authentication.type is 'apiKey' and authentication.in is 'header'.

apiKeyQuery.name: api_key
apiKeyQuery.description: API key passed as a query parameter. Used when authentication.type is 'apiKey' and authentication.in is 'query'.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication required or credentials invalid. The endpoint requires authentication as declared in the discovery manifest's authentication block.

error.message: Bearer token is missing or invalid
